title: Furnitury - Vanilla Styled Furniture
description: Awesome universe of furniture and decorations! (Reeves's Furniture)
body:
# 📋 Complete Minecraft challenges with Checkraft!

# 📖 About
This mod includes over 175+ objects of functional furniture and decorations!
